headline: The J.M. Smucker Raises Dividend, Reinforces Growth Strategy
summary: SJM lifts its dividend for the 25th straight year, backed by strong cash flow and a focused debt-reduction strategy.

raw.headline: The J.M. Smucker Raises Dividend, Reinforces Growth Strategy
raw.summary: SJM lifts its dividend for the 25th straight year, backed by strong cash flow and a focused debt-reduction strategy.

headline: The J.M. Smucker Co. Announces the Election of Douglas Guilherme to Senior Vice President, Operations and Supply Chain
summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. today announced the election of Douglas Guilherme to the role of Senior Vice President, Operations and Supply Chain, effective July 29, reporting to Rob Ferguson, Chief Product Supply Officer | Executive Vice President, Coffee, Pet, and Away From Home.

headline: Ariel Focus Fund Q2 2026 Portfolio Activity
summary: Boutique asset manager, Affiliated Managers Group, Inc. advanced during the quarter, with strong momentum in its alternatives platform. Read more here.
